name: Apple-Cheddar Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the cookies in a single layer at the bottom of a nonstick 9-inch cake pan.
2. Place apples on top of the cookies and sprinkle with apple-pie spice.
3. In a blender, combine cream cheese, cheddar cheese, eggs, sugar substitute, and vanilla extract until smooth.
4. Pour the mixture over the apples.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until set.
6. Serve warm or chilled.
{190 calories per serving with low-fat cheese; 225 with Neufchtel}
COMPLETELY SUGAR-FREE VERSION: Replace wafers with sugar-free dietetic cookies, replace vanilla yogurt with plain low-fat yogurt, omit sugar and increase sugar substitute to equal 12 tablespoons or 3/4 cup. Add 2 teaspoons vanilla extract to the blender before blending. Follow assembly and baking directions as above.
